blockers_or_required_freezes: paired exchanges conserve totals only across reciprocal branches; individual-arm balance is not matched
active boundary seams exceed the candidate 1.25x natural-boundary engineering envelope
seam envelope and practical/equivalence margins remain unsealed design quantities

seam_ratio_DEV.candidate_unsealed_engineering_envelope: post/pre natural seam ratio <= 1.25 in every causal field
seam_ratio_DEV.warning: candidate is based on the exact sham/no-op natural ratio of 1; it is not sealed

global_up_ref.definition: up_ref is set to 0 only inside each future memory-writing update

readout.definition: lam_plus=0 removes m_plus modulation of feeding; lam_minus remains frozen

dynamical_phase_inventory.tracker_state: external observer; re-seeded from outcome-independent post-surgery geometry for qualification

history_pair.rule: max normalized Euclidean contrast in frozen written (dose,order); A is higher lexicographic (dose,order)

crossed_reciprocal_A_B.environment_standardization_role: same exact state as crossed arm; no redundant operator

source.D: matched scheduler step; no persistent buffers or RNG exist
source.G: recipient engine context; up_ref is dynamically recomputed after the exchange
source.collar: no blend; the one-cell H collar is recipient state and seam is measured
source.uptake: opposite donor previous-step readout; not a next-step input

matched_C_A_E_A.operator: unmanipulated matched arm plus exact exchange-kernel sham

matched_C_B_E_B.operator: unmanipulated matched arm plus exact exchange-kernel sham
